title: Session
description: A Claude Code session node keyed by session_id — every hook Event links IN_SESSION to it, so the COMPLETE session (event timeline + archived Document) is restorable from the graph by session_id alone (document/_main.py; Spec 292).

session_id.description: The opaque Claude Code session identifier injected via the SessionStart hook.

status.description: Lifecycle of the session: 'open' on creation, 'closed' on SessionEnd.
